channel.title: Preview on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Preview on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Claude Opus 4.8 (fast mode) is now in preview for GitHub Copilot
item.description:
GitHub Copilot is rolling out Claude Opus 4.8 in preview with fast mode enabled. GitHub says fast mode increases output token speed while keeping the same model intelligence.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: Retirement: Azure VPN Client for Linux (Preview) will be retired on August 31, 2026
item.description:
Azure VPN Client for Linux (Preview) will be retired on August 31, 2026 because it has remained in preview and has no path to general availability. The notice says the retirement is part of aligning Azure networking services with current security and reliability standards.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: dotnet: .NET 11 Preview 5 is now available!
item.description:
The post announces .NET 11 Preview 5 and says it includes updates across the runtime, SDK, libraries, ASP.NET Core, .NET MAUI, C#, Entity Framework Core, and other areas. The provided excerpt does not include specific feature details.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: azure: [In development] Private Preview: Guest RDMA on Azure Boost
item.description:
Guest RDMA is in private preview on Azure in UK South. It uses Azure Boost to enable RDMA in the guest OS for high-throughput, ultra-low-latency networking within the same region.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In development] Preview: Azure Cobalt 200 Arm-based Dpsv7, Dplsv7, Epsv7, Mpsv4, and Lpsv5-series Virtual Machines
item.description:
Azure has previewed new Arm-based Cobalt 200 VM families: Dpsv7, Dplsv7, Epsv7, Mpsv4, and Lpsv5. They are positioned as improvements over the previous Cobalt 100 generation.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In development] Private Preview: Storage optimized Lasv5 and Laosv5 Azure VM series
item.description:
Lasv5 and Laosv5 storage-optimized Azure VM series are now in private preview. They use 5th Gen AMD EPYC (Turin) processors and target storage-intensive workloads, with Lasv5 focused on high disk capacity, throughput, and I/O.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: dotnet: Improving C# Memory Safety
item.description:
C# unsafe is being redesigned to express caller-facing safety contracts instead of only enabling unsafe syntax. The change is in preview for .NET 11 and is meant to make safety obligations clearer and easier to review.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: aks: Release 2026-04-28
item.description:
AKS 2026-04-28 adds new patch releases for Kubernetes 1.33–1.35, introduces several preview features, and updates multiple platform components and node images. It also highlights a security mitigation for CVE-2026-31431, deprecates Kubernetes 1.29 LTS, and starts moving Automatic clusters toward Gateway API-based ingress.

  • Source: Release notes from AKS

item.title: security: Microsoft Agent 365, now generally available, expands capabilities and integrations
item.description:
Microsoft announced general availability of Agent 365 and previewed new features for discovering and managing shadow AI agents, including local agents such as OpenClaw and Claude Code.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Memory in Foundry Agent Service
item.description:
Foundry Agent Service now has a preview memory feature for managed long-term memory. It also integrates natively with Microsoft Agent Framework and LangGraph, without requiring external databases to provision, scale, or secure.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: dotnet: Welcome to SkiaSharp 4.0 Preview 1
item.description:
SkiaSharp 4.0 Preview 1 has been released. The post also notes that Uno Platform has joined as a co-maintainer.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: github: Inline agent mode in preview and more in GitHub Copilot for JetBrains IDEs
item.description:
GitHub Copilot for JetBrains IDEs adds inline agent mode in preview, along with improvements to Next Edit Suggestions and new controls for approving terminal commands and file edits. The update also introduces global auto-approve and other related enhancements.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [In preview] Generally Available: User and group quota reports in Azure NetApp Files
item.description:
Azure NetApp Files now includes user and group quota reporting in preview/GA update. The feature provides visibility into quota limits and usage for NFS, SMB, and dual-protocol volumes.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Monitor AKS applications with OpenTelemetry and Azure Monitor
item.description:
Azure Monitor now supports monitoring applications running on Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) with OpenTelemetry. The preview includes autoinstrumentation to deploy the Azure Monitor OpenTelemetry distribution to workloads.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: aks: Release 2026-04-02
item.description:
AKS release 2026-04-02 adds new Kubernetes patch versions, preview and GA feature updates, component bumps, and several bug fixes/security remediations. It also announces future retirements for Ubuntu 22.04, a kubelet certificate rotation disable tag, and Teleport (preview).

  • Source: Release notes from AKS

item.title: dotnet: Explore union types in C# 15
item.description:
C# 15 adds preview support for union types, letting you define a closed set of case types with implicit conversions and exhaustive pattern matching. The post also notes this fits into a broader exhaustiveness roadmap.

  • Source: .NET
